name: Brownie Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Line a 12 x 1-inch pizza pan with foil for easy removal after baking and grease the foil.
3. Microwave the butter and unsweetened chocolate until melted (about 2 minutes), stirring until smooth.
4. Add sugar to the melted chocolate mixture and stir until combined.
5. Stir in 4 eggs and 1 tsp vanilla, mixing well.
6. Fold in flour and spread batter evenly in prepared pizza pan.
7. Bake for 30 minutes.
8. For topping: Mix cream cheese with 1/4 cup sugar, 1 egg, and 1 tsp vanilla until smooth.
9. Spread the mixture over the hot baked crust.
10. Continue baking for 10 more minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out with fudgy crumbs. Do not overbake.
11. Cool in pan, then lift brownie pizza out using foil and place on serving plate.
12. Arrange fruit slices over cream cheese layer and drizzle with melted semi-sweet chocolate.
